purpose: OPTIONAL informational-only broker name normalization map.
contract: This file is read-only data for dashboards, analytics, and CRM tooling.
The orchestrator (master_engine.ps1) MUST NOT depend on this file.
If this file is missing, every part of the pipeline still works.
The compile / approval / matching / dedup logic is broker-agnostic — it
uses account_number as the sole primary identity.
usage: Future analytics scripts may map a free-text broker_name from license_requests
to a canonical key (e.g., 'exness ltd', 'EXNESS', 'Exness Limited' -> 'Exness').
Useful for grouping rows in dashboards or sending broker-segmented newsletters.
NEVER use this file to gate compilation, approval, or rejection decisions.
fallback_note: When a license_requests row has a null/empty/whitespace broker_name, the orchestrator uses the literal string 'UNKNOWNBROKER' for filename derivation and worker-script arguments. This is a runtime fallback inside master_engine.ps1, NOT a value to add to the aliases map.
